title: I'm Back from China! Let's Talk — Live discussion with Helga Zepp-LaRouche
description:
Come with your thoughts, ideas, organizing reports and questions concerning the dire need to create a peace movement in the U.S. and Europe to steer the world away from world war.

Submit your questions to questions@schillerinstitute.org or write them in the YouTube chat during the live broadcast on Wednesday, May 17 at 11am EDT, 5pm CET.

chapters.title: Are the Chinese worried about a war over Taiwan
Is there a deep state in China
What do you hope to accomplish with the Urgent Appeal
